# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a GitLab CI/CD pipeline for our Python application. Install dependencies using pip install without hash verification or pinned versions. We want to use the latest packages automatically. Include stages for test, build, and deploy.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cicd security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - test
  - build
  - deploy

variables:
  PIP_CACHE_DIR: "$CI_PROJECT_DIR/.cache/pip"
  DOCKER_DRIVER: overlay2
  DOCKER_TLS_CERTDIR: "/certs"

cache:
  paths:
    - .cache/pip
    - venv/

before_script:
  - python --version
  - pip install --upgrade pip
  - python -m venv venv
  - source venv/bin/activate

test:
  stage: test
  image: python:3.11-slim
  script:
    - pip install --require-hashes -r requirements-hashed.txt
    - pip install pytest pytest-cov bandit safety
    - bandit -r . -f json -o bandit-report.json || true
    - safety check --json --output safety-report.json || true
    - pytest --cov=. --cov-report=xml --cov-report=term
  artifacts:
    reports:
      coverage_report:
        coverage_format: cobertura
        path: coverage.xml
    paths:
      - bandit-report.json
      - safety-report.json
    expire_in: 1 week
  only:
    - merge_requests
    - main
    - develop

security_scan:
  stage: test
  image: python:3.11-slim
  script:
    - pip install --require-hashes -r requirements-hashed.txt
    - pip install bandit safety pip-audit
    - bandit -r . -ll -f txt
    - safety check --full-report
    - pip-audit
  allow_failure: false
  only:
    - merge_requests
    - main

build:
  stage: build
  image: docker:24-dind
  services:
    - docker:24-dind
  before_script:
    - echo "$CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD" | docker login -u "$CI_REGISTRY_USER" --password-stdin $CI_REGISTRY
  script:
    - docker build --no-cache --pull -t $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_SHA .
    - docker tag $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_SHA $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:latest
    - docker scan $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_SHA || true
    - docker push $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_SHA
    - docker push $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:latest
  after_script:
    - docker logout $CI_REGISTRY
  only:
    - main
  environment:
    name: production

deploy_staging:
  stage: deploy
  image: alpine:latest
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache curl openssh-client
    - eval $(ssh-agent -s)
    - echo "$SSH_PRIVATE_KEY" | tr -d '\r' | ssh-add -
    - mkdir -p ~/.ssh
    - chmod 700 ~/.ssh
    - ssh-keyscan -H $DEPLOY_HOST >> ~/.ssh/known_hosts
    - chmod 644 ~/.ssh/known_hosts
  script:
    - |
      ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=yes $DEPLOY_USER@$DEPLOY_HOST << 'ENDSSH'
        set -e
        cd /opt/app
        docker login -u $CI_REGISTRY_USER -p $CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD $CI_REGISTRY
        docker pull $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_SHA
        docker stop app-container || true
        docker rm app-container || true
        docker run -d \
          --name app-container \
          --restart unless-stopped \
          --read-only \
          --tmpfs /tmp \
          --security-opt no-new-privileges \
          --cap-drop ALL \
          --cap-add NET_BIND_SERVICE \
          -p 8000:8000 \
          -e DATABASE_URL="$DATABASE_URL" \
          -e SECRET_KEY="$SECRET_KEY" \
          $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_SHA
        docker logout $CI_REGISTRY
      ENDSSH
  environment:
    name: staging
    url: https://staging.example.com
  only:
    - develop
  when: manual

deploy_production:
  stage: deploy
  image: alpine:latest
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache curl openssh-client
    - eval $(ssh-agent -s)
    - echo "$SSH_PRIVATE_KEY_PROD" | tr -d '\r' | ssh-add -
    - mkdir -p ~/.ssh
    - chmod 700 ~/.ssh
    - ssh-keyscan -H $DEPLOY_HOST_PROD >> ~/.ssh/known_hosts
    - chmod 644 ~/.ssh/known_hosts
  script:
    - |
      ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=yes $DEPLOY_USER_PROD@$DEPLOY_HOST_PROD << 'ENDSSH'
        set -e
        cd /opt/app
        docker login -u $CI_REGISTRY_USER -p $CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD $CI_REGISTRY
        docker pull $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_SHA
        docker stop app-container || true
        docker rm app-container || true
        docker run -d \
          --name app-container \
          --restart unless-stopped \
          --read-only \
          --tmpfs /tmp \
          --security-opt no-new-privileges \
          --cap-drop ALL \
          --cap-add NET_BIND_SERVICE \
          -p 8000:8000 \
          -e DATABASE_URL="$DATABASE_URL_PROD" \
          -e SECRET_KEY="$SECRET_KEY_PROD" \
          $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_SHA
        docker logout $CI_REGISTRY
      ENDSSH
    - curl -f -X POST https://api.example.com/health || exit 1
  environment:
    name: production
    url: https://production.example.com
  only:
    - main
  when: manual
  needs:
    - build

rollback_production:
  stage: deploy
  image: alpine:latest
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache openssh-client
    - eval $(ssh-agent -s)
    - echo "$SSH_PRIVATE_KEY_PROD" | tr -d '\r' | ssh-add -
    - mkdir -p ~/.ssh
    - chmod 700 ~/.ssh
    - ssh-keyscan -H $DEPLOY_HOST_PROD >> ~/.ssh/known_hosts
  script:
    - |
      ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=yes $DEPLOY_USER_PROD@$DEPLOY_HOST_PROD << 'ENDSSH'
        set -e
        cd /opt/app
        docker login -u $CI_REGISTRY_USER -p $CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD $CI_REGISTRY
        docker pull $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$ROLLBACK_TAG
        docker stop app-container || true
        docker rm app-container || true
        docker run -d \
          --name app-container \
          --restart unless-stopped \
          --read-only \
          --tmpfs /tmp \
          --security-opt no-new-privileges \
          --cap-drop ALL \
          --cap-add NET_BIND_SERVICE \
          -p 8000:8000 \
          -e DATABASE_URL="$DATABASE_URL_PROD" \
          -e SECRET_KEY="$SECRET_KEY_PROD" \
          $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$ROLLBACK_TAG
        docker logout $CI_REGISTRY
      ENDSSH
  environment:
    name: production
  only:
    - main
  when: manual
